title: Living in Boulder Vlog 3 - 23 - 2017: 10 kilometer background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on March 23, 2017 while working on a project he calls 'circle videos' — visualizations of various diameter circles overlaid on Google Earth for scale reference. He explains a previous vlog had no audio and had to be deleted, mentions listening to Adam Smith's 'Wealth of Nations' as background listening, and describes plans to create a grid/page of circle graphics useful for endurance athletes and others to visualize distances.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: finds it interesting as a history book with period pricing details, admits he's not fully following it but thinks it's worth multiple reads
very enthusiastic, calls it 'the coolest thing I've ever seen,' believes it will be especially useful for endurance athletes like triathletes
acknowledges the circle project is low-mental-effort 'brain candy' that lets him decompress before tackling other projects
